# .NET 10 Upgrade Progress

## Overview

Upgrading RPS Launcher.sln (single Windows Forms project) from .NET Framework 4.7.2 to .NET 10.0 using an all-at-once approach.

**Progress**: 0/4 tasks complete <progress value="0" max="100"></progress> 0%

## Tasks

- 🔲 01-prerequisites: Verify SDK and tooling compatibility
- 🔲 02-sdk-conversion: Convert project to SDK-style format
- 🔲 03-upgrade-framework: Update target framework to net10.0-windows
- 🔲 04-validation: Final validation and documentation
